Mod.name: Notes Expanded
Mod.description:
[h1] NotesExpanded [/h1] Cast your spells with expanded song!
This mod fills out the Kantele and Ocarina notes across several octaves: 2 for Kantele and 3 for Ocarina. If you want to find them, go look for the Ocarina!
Here's the link to the [url=https://github.com/Sharpy796/NotesExpanded]GitHub[/url] version of the mod!
